---
title: "Sentinel_Soil_Moisture"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Sourcing Data

Based on my preliminary readings, it seems like the package `rstac` is going to be my best source for pre-processed and analysis-ready data.

```{r}
library(rstac)

# Sets the STAC to Microsoft's Planetary Computer
stac_source <- stac(
  "https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/api/stac/v1"
)

# This one will list the data collections available in that STAC
collections_query <- stac_source |> 
  collections()

# This runs the collection query and saves the result
coll_list <- get_request(collections_query)

library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)

readable_list <- tibble(
  collection = map_chr(coll_list$collections, "id")
)
```
